  --RunMode                                    (Default: DryRun) RunMode is one

  --AwsAccessKey                               The access key to the AWS account

  --TemplateS3Path                             Base s3 path for cloudformation
                                               template deployment

  --WriteCloudFormationTemplatesToDirectory    Output cloudformation templates
                                               to folder instead of deploying

  --AwsLogging                                 (Default: false) Enable AWS SDK
                                               logging
